examples: The same Negroes plied the shovel and sang. Old Big Slim Hazard had once worked on the Algiers ferry as a deckhand.
A deckhand yelled at the kids and made them pick the rocks up.
Which deckhand found the photo of the Adama family in the Colonial Fleet archives?
Deckhand Bruce Paterson said they were resting, or as close to sleep as whales get.
'I came here from Edinburgh eight years ago, got a job as a deckhand and never left.
